constraints.layout_style: table rows with inputs in td cells

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient

reference_templates.title: Aria describedby hints
reference_templates.notes: Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Describedby hints

Include country code, e.g. +44 7700 900000

reference_templates.title: Lever custom file button
reference_templates.notes: Lever-inspired resume upload with visible custom button hiding native input
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Lever file upload

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: When combobox widget requested, use custom listbox - native select alone is insufficient Reference DOM (Aria describedby hints): Fields use aria-describedby for format hints separate from label Reference DOM (Greenhouse progress dots): Greenhouse-inspired multi-section form with progress indicator dots Reference DOM (Lever custom file button): Lever-inspired resume upload with visible custom button hiding native input Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: pill-yes-no, custom-combobox, split-phone, label-wraps-deep, native-select-not-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: table rows with inputs in td cells. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Aria describedby hints; Greenhouse progress dots; Lever custom file button.
